## Type of change

<!-- Mark all that apply with [x] -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer ci` passes locally (cs + analyze + test)
- [ ] New code is covered by tests
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] User-visible changes documented in `docs/`
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, credentials, tokens)
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `test:`, `chore:`)
